idea_clean: For morning and evening review: (103) God, being Love, is also happiness. Let me remember love is happiness, and nothing else brings joy. And so I choose to entertain no substitutes for love. (104) I seek but what belongs to me in truth. Love is my heritage, and with it joy. These are the gifts my Father gave to me. I would accept all that is mine in truth. On the hour: God, being Love, is also happiness. On the half hour: I seek but what belongs to me in truth.

practice_instructions.frequency: Twice a day (morning/evening), plus hourly and half-hourly reminders
practice_instructions.description: Morning/evening: Spend 5 minutes reviewing the ideas. Hourly: Repeat the first idea on the hour. Half-hourly: Repeat the second idea on the half-hour.
